arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: More on Bayern Munich’s rumored summer pursuit of Florian Wirtz; Mykhailo Mudryk seeking to bolt Chelsea?; Manchester City to “do everything” to get Jamal Musiala?; Arsenal might be gaining ground with Dušan Vlahović; and MORE!
arts.sum: Premier League champions Manchester City are reportedly ready to “do everything” to beat Real Madrid to 21-year-old Bayern Munich whizkid Jamal Musiala. Bayern Munich are keen on bringing Bayer Leverkusen talent Florian Wirtz to the Allianz Arena next summer but the German giants will face strong competition from Man City and Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss hails head coach Vincent Kompany’s communication skills, football vision
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sure feels like it got its man in the end. From a human perspective, he knows how to deal with the players, how to accurately communicate his ideas — active football, aggressive pressing, a lot of man to man and taking risks.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany not feeling pressure ahead of battle with Bayer Leverkusen’s Xabi Alonso
arts.sum: When Bayern Munich decided to move on from Thomas Tuchel last season, most of the attention generated for the club’s coaching search was focused on Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso, who has transformed Die Werkself into a juggernaut. Alonso ultimately decided to stay put and the Bavarians hired Vincent Kompany.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Christoph Freund unsure if Manuel Neuer will consider return to German national team
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Manuel Neuer made the tough decision to retire from international football and turn his full focus to his health and club career. Speculation already has mounted on whether or not Neuer will consider returning to Germany, but Bayern Munich sporting director Christophe Freund indicated that he was not sure if that kind of move was in the cards for the goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Thomas Müller rates his latest Bayern Munich performances
arts.sum: “Personally, I’m in a good mood and, although I haven’t picked up too many minutes so far, I’ve still been involved in every game. “Generally good,” Müller said in a recent interview with Bundesliga.com, reflecting on his performances in 2024/25 so far (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Jeremie Frimpong still ranks Celtic the BEST in one category as he gives Hoops '50/50' chance of Dortmund upset
arts.sum: Frimpong can see his old team springing a surprise on the German giants

arts.ttl: Lukáš Hrádecký: "We'll need to up our game against Bayern Munich"
arts.sum: As reigning Bundesliga champions, Bayer Leverkusen enter this weekend's clash against Bayern Munich in a strong position. Ahead of the encounter, Werkself captain Lukáš Hrádecký spoke to bundesliga.com about the visit to the Allianz Arena and how it feels to be the Meisterschale holders...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich exec looking forward to seeing Jamal Musiala and Florian Wirtz on field together
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala gives me great joy as sporting director of Bayern Munich. The Bundesliga’s marquee matchup will feature two of the league — and the world’s — most exciting young players in Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala and Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz.

arts.ttl: Granit Xhaka ready to lead Leverkusen against Bayern Munich in Bundesliga clash of titans
arts.sum: All eyes will be on Bavaria this Saturday as Bayern Munich takes on Bayer Leverkusen in an early-season chance to reassert its claim on the German throne. After Bayern’s strong start under new head coach Vincent Kompany — and Leverkusen’s early-season stumble in a 2-3 loss to RB Leipzig — the defending champions know they cannot simply approach this one as favorites.
